name: shopify-skills
description: One Shopify operations bundle with 27 workflow skills for reports, exports, discounts, product copy, inventory, SEO, and more.

interface.shortDescription: Run Shopify store operations from an AI agent.
interface.longDescription: Install one Shopify operations bundle with 27 workflow skills for order analytics, customer segmentation, discounts, product copy, inventory forecasting, store health, SEO, exports, and more. Write-capable workflows are preview-first and require user approval.
defaultPrompt: Use Shopify Skills to set up my Shopify store.
Use Shopify Skills to run a store health report.
Use Shopify Skills to analyze recent orders and summarize revenue, AOV, repeat purchase rate, top products, and geographic breakdown.
